register: Anetaki-sanctuary Linear A inscriptions — deduplicated edition/witness register

KN Zg 57.object: ivory Ring ('sceptre' head), elephant-tusk slice, outer diam. c. 13.5-14 cm, faces A/B/C/D
KN Zg 57.findspot: Knossos, Bougada Metochi (Anetaki plot), Neopalatial Room 1, Ivory Repository (NW corner votive deposit), found 2016 (Kanta); Herakleion Ephorate Δ 3460/Δ 3458
KN Zg 57.numbering_authority: Del Freo, Rapport 2016-2021, p. 99 (inedit) + Kanta et al. 2024 fn. 7 (GORILA numbering)
KN Zg 57.in_silver_corpus: PARTIALLY — silver id KNZg57a carries a 5-token preliminary reading (*401+RU, *401+RU, *418+L2, NI, VAS + lacunae) inherited from lineara.xyz; ultimate published source of that reading NOT identified in the public record (assumption A-3, confidence <= 0.5)
aliases: Younger misctexts 'KN Zh no no.' ivory band/sceptre (Kanta 2018 exh. cat. no. 280, D. 13.7 cm) — same object, designation-letter discrepancy recorded

KN Zg 58.object: ivory bar/handle, quadrangular section, 13.2 cm, faces α/β/γ/δ + one end
KN Zg 58.findspot: same 2016 votive deposit as KN Zg 57
KN Zg 58.numbering_authority: Del Freo, Rapport 2016-2021, pp. 99-100 (inedit) + Kanta et al. 2024
KN Zg 58.numbering_collision: Younger misctexts.txt line 2834 uses 'KN Zg 58' for an OLDER steatite amygdaloid (HM 843; CMS II 3, no. 23) with HIEROGLYPHIC signs — a genuine collision between Younger's site numbering and the Del Freo/Kanta numbering; the ivory bar is the authoritative KN Zg 58 (A-2)

KN Zg 55.object: steatite/chlorite disk seal (HM 621; CMS II 2, no. 213), chance find, MM III/LM I — NOT from the Anetaki excavation deposit
KN Zg 55.note: in the task's target list but not an Anetaki-deposit item; Civitillo 2024 (Ariadne Suppl. 5, 511-526) discusses it as one of four LA seals

KN Zg 56.object: UNIDENTIFIED — no attestation found in GORILA holdings, Younger, Del Freo Rapport 2016-2021, Civitillo 2024, silver corpus, or any web route searched this epoch
KN Zg 56.status: NOT_ESTABLISHED as an Anetaki (or any) item; the task brief's '55, 56, 57, 58' enumeration is not supported for 56

editions.citation: A. Kanta, D. Nakassis, T. G. Palaima & M. Perna, 'An archaeological and epigraphical overview of some inscriptions found in the Cult Center of the city of Knossos (Anetaki plot)', in J. Bennet, A. Karnava & T. Meissner (eds), KO-RO-NO-WE-SA (Ariadne Supplement Series 5), Rethymno 2024, pp. 27-43
editions.role: ONLY scholarly edition/witness with epigraphic content; preliminary overview; prints NO transliterated sign sequences
editions.accessibility: open access; on disk at corpus/bronze/kanta_etal_2024_anetaki/ (sha256 87dad27b…57d2; frontmatter variant bc50adba…69bb)
editions.note_on_dating: volume imprint 2024; online/media wave March-April 2025 explains the 'Ariadne Supplements 2025' citation in the K-epoch finding — SAME edition, no separate 2025 publication exists

editions.citation: M. Del Freo, 'Rapport 2016-2021 …', same volume, pp. 87-124 (KN Zg 57/58 at pp. 99-100)
editions.role: authoritative numbering + physical description; both items 'inedit'; NO readings
editions.accessibility: open access; on disk at corpus/bronze/delfreo_rapport_koronowesa/

editions.citation: A. Kanta (ed.), Anetaki II: the Neopalatial Room 1 and the Ivory Repository, Philadelphia: INSTAP Academic Press, forthcoming (cited in kanta_etal_2024 fns. 6, 8, 10, 13 and bibliography)
editions.role: the full edition with transliterations — the target of both frozen prospective seals
editions.status_2026_07_08: UNPUBLISHED — not on instappress.org (site checked: no Kanta/Anetaki title live or forthcoming-listed), no Kadmos edition materialized (Younger's 2023 pointer superseded), no Zenodo/arXiv/academia.edu preprint found

editions.citation: lineara.xyz corpus (mwenge), inherited into corpus/silver as KNZg57a
editions.role: preliminary partial reading witness: *401+RU, *401+RU, *418+L2, NI, VAS + 6 lacuna marks; face not stated
editions.provenance_gap: ultimate published source NOT identified this epoch (no public transliteration exists); possibly read from exhibition/press photographs; treated at confidence <= 0.5 (assumption A-3)
editions.consistency: *401+RU coheres with the editors' 'vas+RU' ligature statement (kanta_etal_2024 p. 38); NI and VAS plausibly Face A vase/commodity signs

editions.citation: S. V. Rjabchikov 2025, 'The Decipherment of two Records of Linear A on the Ivory Mirror from Knossos, Crete', Novaya Nauka proceedings, Petrozavodsk, pp. 100-106
editions.role: FRINGE photo-based readings; QUARANTINED registry object, never evidence (litindex claim_type fringe_sceptre_reading)

editions.citation: D. Chiapello 2024, 'Deductions on an unknown find …' (Academia.edu self-post, 2024-02-07)
editions.role: pre-publication PREDICTION registry object (no readings printed in the archived abstract/page)
editions.accessibility: archived page at corpus/bronze/prepub_prediction_2024_ivory_circle/ (PDF login-gated, not acquired)

editions.citation: GreekReporter 2025-04-28 + 2026-03-30 re-run; La Brujula Verde 2025-03; Biblical Archaeology Society; languagehat; World History Encyclopedia image page; diggingupthepast.net; scribd copy of kanta_etal_2024
editions.role: derivative media of kanta_etal_2024 ONLY; no independent epigraphic content; never reading sources
editions.checked_2026_07_08: the 2026-03-30 GreekReporter item reports no new publication
